agent.status: Made shared links look good: when someone drops a MIME-FF link in a chat or on social, it now shows a proper branded preview card instead of a bare URL. Also added the standard search-engine files (robots + sitemap) so we can actually be found.
agent.direction: Two more small pre-launch fixes: prompt signed-in users with no location set, and a decline-from-email bug for out-of-range players
